features.name: clock-typed signal used as register data input
features.description: Code should include an always_ff register whose data (D) input is driven by a clock signal rather than a plain logic/integer data signal, creating a non-integer-typed register scenario

features.name: packed struct register type in sequential logic
features.description: Code should include an always_ff register whose type is a packed struct rather than a plain integer or logic vector, representing a non-integer-typed register
